groups.title: The living model
groups.description: How the repository-owned `.vibekb/` content is loaded, parsed, relationship-resolved, and validated into the model everything else renders.

groups.title: AI coding workflow
groups.description: How a coding agent starts a session, finds what a change affects, detects drift, records active work, and hands off — the self-maintenance lifecycle.

groups.title: The developer CLI (Go front-end)
groups.description: A single `vibekb` binary that fronts the whole toolchain: native diagnostics that need no runtime, and honest delegation to the canonical PHP core for every command that touches the model.

groups.title: The dynamic guide (Mode A)
groups.description: The live PHP app that renders the model in the browser: routing, provenance, and search.

groups.title: The static snapshot (Mode B)
groups.description: Rendering the same model through the same templates into a self-contained /docs site for GitHub Pages or any static host.

groups.title: Explainable diagrams
groups.description: Source-grounded diagrams whose repository-owned topology gives every node a purpose, every edge a mechanism, and every file a reason.

groups.title: Adopting VibeKB elsewhere
groups.description: Initializing a VibeKB model inside another repository.

groups.title: Deployment & portability
groups.description: How the guide deploys to shared hosting and stays portable with no build step.
